about.title: About Sounds Of
about.content:
Come make with Brewing Folk

We’re looking for voices—your voice—to bring something special to our community through monthly radio shows.

Here’s the thing: we believe everyone has a story worth sharing, a passion worth celebrating, or knowledge worth spreading. Maybe you’re obsessed with obscure vinyl, run a local charity, host community events, have a business you’re building, or just love connecting people through conversation. Whatever lights you up, we want to help you share it.

What we’re looking for:

Shows that are 1-2 hours long
Content that includes talking (not just music mixes—we want to hear YOU)
A monthly commitment
Local voices with heart and something to say
What we’ll give you:

A platform that reaches our whole community
Studio space and full training (never made a radio show? No problem—we’ll teach you everything)
Promotion through our website and social media
Support to help your show shine
We’ll push your show through our channels, and we’d love for you to share it through yours too. Together, we’ll build something that brings people closer.

If you’ve ever thought “I wish I had a radio show,” this is your moment. Whether you’re experienced or have never touched a microphone, if you’re local to the brewery and have passion to share—we want to hear from you.

Let’s create something meaningful together.

Ready to talk? Get in touch and let’s make this happen.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.content: Want to pitch a show? Collaborate? Just say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
